item.title: Case Cracked Using A Single Coffee Cup
item.description: A look at how investigators cracked a case using a single coffee cup, highlighting the evidence, analysis, and key discoveries.

item.title: One Step Closer To Justice For The 19-Year-Old
item.description: A long-awaited breakthrough brings hope in the search for justice for the 19-year-old victim.

item.title: Small Town SHOOK by The Case Of Glenn Kopitske!
item.description: A quiet small town is left stunned as the disturbing case of Glenn Kopitske begins to unravel.
